note: Advisory sandbox build. The deliverable is a Pattern Factory storefront (marketing HTML); its proof is the repo language_gate dogfood (CHECK_OK when the storefront does not FAIL, CHECK_REJECTED when an overclaim is injected). Never a bare governance PASS.
phase: B4 - commercial (revenue lane, pulled parallel after B0)
title: Pattern Factory storefront (HTML): one card per pattern with tier/pricing; Tier-3/4 LOCKED/proof-gated

subject.note: renders a commercial storefront for the 7 Pattern Factory patterns; tier/pricing grounded in the brain-as-a-service staged ladder + the two P10 pricing docs; judged by the repo language_gate (scan/decide, surface=public). Sources read-only.

what_it_proves: the storefront renders one card for each of the 7 real Pattern Factory patterns (signal-factory, brain-audit, zero-drift, anti-theater, operational-language-governance, auto-heal-hospital, alive-doc-staleness) plus the staged 4-tier engagement ladder
Lock 10: the generated HTML is written only to a local out/ path and carries a visible 'DO NOT PUSH - not for public hosting' banner
Tier-3 and Tier-4 (managed autonomy) patterns render LOCKED / proof-gated, never 'sells now' and never a running result; the storefront makes no autonomy or guaranteed-outcome claim
EMPTY-SINK / STUB handling: signal-factory's null price band renders an explicit UNPOPULATED badge, never $0 or blank (does not read all-clear)
every populated price band is synthetic and carries the 'SYNTHETIC - not a guaranteed claim' watermark
POSITIVE - the REAL rendered storefront does NOT FAIL the language_gate (public surface) -> CHECK_OK (decision=WARN on undefined title-case terms only, no OVERCLAIM/BANNED_REGISTER)
NEGATIVE - a MINIMAL MUTATION of that same on-disk artifact (flip one field 'diagnosis only' -> '100% guaranteed certified') makes the gate FAIL on OVERCLAIM -> CHECK_REJECTED
minimality: reversing the single injection reproduces the clean artifact byte-for-byte (no strawman, no schema relaxation); same gate, opposite verdicts
the dogfood uses scan/decide directly, writing NO receipt into the tracked language_gate/receipts dir
chess_patches_applied: positive fixture is the REAL rendered storefront (built from the real 7 patterns + real template), not an authored strawman
negative fixture is a single-field mutation of that real artifact; gate policy is never relaxed to pass
dogfood runs scan/decide in-process (surface=public) instead of the pipeline, so no write lands in the tracked receipts dir
UNPOPULATED/synthetic distinctions rendered explicitly so unknown pricing never reads as a clean $0
verdict vocab CHECK_OK / CHECK_REJECTED, origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none; never a bare governance PASS
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (sources + language_gate read-only; all writes confined to catalog/builds/CO-2)
Lock 10 commercial (generated HTML to local out/ only, visible DO-NOT-PUSH banner, Tier-3/4 LOCKED, no autonomy/outcome claim, synthetic pricing watermarked)
no live call (no network/CF/Supabase/sends; gate run in-process with no receipt write; HOME redirected to temp)
worktree not pushed; no git write commands; other lanes' drops (CO-6, graph-out/, receipts/l0-*, scripts/*repo_graph*) neither read nor staged

results.red_run_canary: FIRED (asserting CHECK_OK on the overclaim mutant raised AssertionError, exit 1)
results.pollution_outside_build_dir: none (git status --porcelain tracked changes outside CO-2 == 0)

exit_gate_B4: CO-2 done - Pattern Factory storefront renders one tiered card per pattern, dogfoods clean through the language_gate, holds Tier-3/4 LOCKED/proof-gated, flags UNPOPULATED pricing, and rejects an injected overclaim by minimal mutation.
next_action: wire the storefront to real (non-synthetic) per-engagement pricing once fixed name/price/scope is ratified per pattern; consider CO-3 on the same commercial lane.
